children.name: heading
children.characters: The industry charges you for every move you make.

children.name: subtitle
children.characters: The travel industry runs on a broken model. Your agency is paying the price.

children.name: heading
children.characters: Agents juggle multiple travel platforms to quote one fare.

children.name: body
children.characters: Agents waste hours toggling between Sabre, Amadeus, Travelport, losing deals while competitors quote instantly.

children.name: heading
children.characters: Agencies pay heavily for 3rd party tools they'll never own.

children.name: body
children.characters: Each booking enriches the platform, not you. Rising per-segment fees & IATA overhead eat your margin on tickets.

children.name: heading
children.characters: GDS - airline disputes become your crisis

children.name: body
children.characters: Policy disputes and NDC content blackouts turn into your crisis. Your bookings disappear when others fight.

children.name: The model is broken on purpose.
children.characters: The model is broken on purpose.
